title: mariscus tacnensis
intro: Mariscus tacnensis, also known as Tacna sedge, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Mariscus tacnensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water to make a medicinal tea.
